title: Pythagorean Tree FAIL: demonstrates a wrong M_A child
sources: Barning-Hall/Berggren ternary tree of primitive Pythagorean triples (Barning, 1963)
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants a deterministically detectable violation: root (d,e)=(2,1) declares its M_A child as (d,e)=(4,2) instead of the correct M_A(2,1)=(2*2-1,2)=(3,2); (4,2) is also not primitive (gcd=2).

fail_ledger.message: declared M_A child (4,2), expected (2*2-1,2)=(3,2); also gcd(4,2)=2≠1
